basics.name: LI Baichuan
basics.summary: Computer Engineering undergraduate at HKUST working on LLM-powered systems, multimodal AI, and mobile applications.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
courses: COMP2012 Object-Oriented Programming and Data Structures (A)
COMP2211 Exploring Artificial Intelligence with Python (A)

publications.name: AutoTour: Automatic Photo Tour Guide with Smartphones and LLMs
publications.summary: Research project on smartphone-based tour guidance systems using large language models.

publications.name: MMRouter
publications.summary: Research project on routing multimodal queries to improve cost-performance trade-offs in model selection.

teaching.institution: HKUST, Department of Computer Science and Engineering
teaching.description: Supported tutorials, office hours, grading, and student questions.

portfolio.name: Nuola (挪啦)
portfolio.description: Flutter app for critical SMS detection and real-time alerting, deployed on major Android app galleries in China with 500+ active users in the first month and initial revenue.

portfolio.name: VocabuStory
portfolio.description: LLM-powered Flutter application for language learning through customized narrative generation and interactive content design.

portfolio.name: Agent Skills for Study Automation
portfolio.description: Reusable summarize-slides and homework-solver agent skills for multi-agent study workflows, receiving 6,000+ likes/saves on Xiaohongshu and 80+ GitHub stars.
